TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 陪睡文化_mp’abi

TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 陪睡文化 mp'abi == mongna payas " mp'abi mp' abi , mp'abi,但不是每一次陪睡 mp'abi mp'abi 經驗, mp'abi ngasal agiq, 茅草 agiq agiq agiq ngasal cisbut agiq ngasal ruma 來建造房子.
S.PHON: == **** mpʔaβi == moŋna pajas~ɕ " mpʔaβi mpʔ aβi , mpʔaβi,******** mpʔaβi mpʔaβi **, mpʔaβi ŋas~ɕal aɣiq, ** aɣiq aɣiq aɣiq ŋas~ɕal ʦ~ʨis~ɕβut aɣiq ŋas~ɕal ruma *****.
S.FORM: == 陪睡文化 mp'abi == mongna payas " mp'abi mp' abi , mp'abi,但不是每一次陪睡 mp'abi mp'abi 經驗, mp'abi ngasal agiq, 茅草 agiq agiq agiq ngasal cisbut agiq ngasal ruma 來建造房子.
S.PHON: == **** mpʔaβi == moŋna pajas~ɕ " mpʔaβi mpʔ aβi , mpʔaβi,******** mpʔaβi mpʔaβi **, mpʔaβi ŋas~ɕal aɣiq, ** aɣiq aɣiq aɣiq ŋas~ɕal ʦ~ʨis~ɕβut aɣiq ŋas~ɕal ruma *****.
